Meaning.En: A male given name of Hebrew origin, meaning "beloved". In the Bible, King David was a central figure in the Old Testament, known for his wisdom, psalms, and unifying Israel.
Meaning.Example: David wrote many of the Psalms in the Bible.

Situation.Vi: Người tên David trong Kinh Thánh, vua của Israel, người soạn nhiều Thánh Vịnh.
Situation.En: The biblical King David, a shepherd who became king of Israel and author of many Psalms.

Situation.Vi: Tên gọi phổ biến cho nam giới trong nhiều nền văn hóa phương Tây.
Situation.En: A common masculine given name in English-, Spanish-, and French-speaking cultures.
